programme.title: Mrs. Davis
programme.sub-title: THE FINAL INTERCUT So I'm Your Horse

programme.title: Mrs. Davis
programme.sub-title: Mother Of Mercy: The Call Of The Horse
programme.desc: A nun is forced to leave her quiet life at a convent when an all-powerful artificial intelligence known as Mrs Davis enlists her to complete an epic quest.

programme.title: Mrs. Davis
programme.sub-title: Zwei Sie Piel Mit Seitung Sie Wirtschaftung

programme.title: Mrs. Davis
programme.sub-title: A Sad Boy With Wings And A Great Helmet
programme.desc: The pursuit of a lead reignites tensions between Wiley and Simone, exposing old scars and long-kept secrets.

programme.title: Mrs. Davis
programme.sub-title: Beautiful Things That Come With Madness
programme.desc: When Jay proposes a side mission, Simone must deviate from her quest or risk breaking her vows; Wiley's kidnapping by a mysterious priest exposes an even larger conspiracy.

programme.title: Mrs. Davis
programme.sub-title: A Great Place To Drink To Gain Control Of Your Drink
programme.desc: Simone and Wiley's hunt for the red-haired woman leads them to an enigmatic new source, and together they uncover the dangerous truth about their connection to Clara.

programme.title: Mrs. Davis
programme.sub-title: Allison Treasures: A Southern California Story
programme.desc: After learning the whereabouts of the Holy Grail, Simone partners with Wiley and the Resistance to heist a special suit needed for its extraction.

programme.title: Mrs. Davis
programme.desc: Simone and Celeste set out in pursuit of the Holy Grail. Wiley, his Expiration Date imminent, receives an unexpected offer from Mrs Davis that could rewrite his future.

programme.title: Mrs. Davis
programme.sub-title: THE FINAL INTERCUT So I'm Your Horse

programme.title: The Idol
programme.desc: A pop star preparing for her triumphant return to the music industry develops a complicated relationship with a modern-day cult leader.

programme.title: The Idol
programme.desc: After clashing with her team over her album's first single, Jocelyn pushes herself to the limit on the set of her new music video, while Nikki sees potential in backup dancer Dyanne.

programme.title: The Idol
programme.desc: As Tedros inserts himself into Jocelyn's life by offering input on her wardrobe and collaborators, Leia brings her growing concerns to Chaim and Destiny.

programme.title: The Idol
programme.desc: While planning a showcase for her upcoming tour, Jocelyn begins to take control of the relationships around her - much to Tedros's dismay.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: Follows Natasha, furious that her closest friends are all having babies. When she is unexpectedly landed with a baby of her own, her life dramatically implodes and twists into a surreal horror show.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: Despite Mrs Eaves' shocking solution to her baby problem, Natasha finds herself willing to do anything in exchange for her help, even if it's the herculean task of nap time.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: With the baby now in Bobbi's hands, Natasha must reunite with her mother, Barbara, whom she hasn't seen in 15 years.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: As Natasha and Mrs Eaves remain trapped in Barbara's summer solstice ritual, the baby's complicated origin, connection to Mrs Eaves, and trauma-filled path to Natasha are revealed.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: Desperate to leave the Jupiter House, Natasha, Bobbi, and Mrs Eaves find their plans thwarted by the chaos and destruction of the other suddenly possessed children.

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: In a last-ditch effort to break the curse, a severely weakened yet determined Mrs Eaves sets off with Natasha in pursuit of Jack.

programme.title: The Idol
programme.desc: A pop star preparing for her triumphant return to the music industry develops a complicated relationship with a modern-day cult leader.

programme.title: The Idol
programme.desc: After clashing with her team over her album's first single, Jocelyn pushes herself to the limit on the set of her new music video, while Nikki sees potential in backup dancer Dyanne.

programme.title: The Idol
programme.desc: While fighting for the upper hand in her relationship with Tedros, Jocelyn becomes determined to introduce her new persona to the world.

programme.title: The Idol
programme.desc: While planning a showcase for her upcoming tour, Jocelyn begins to take control of the relationships around her - much to Tedros's dismay.

programme.title: AFLW: EF: CAR v WC
programme.desc: It's do-or-die for Carlton and West Coast in its maiden AFLW finals appearance when they clash in an Elimination Final at Ikon Park.

programme.title: AFLW: QF MEL v BRI
programme.desc: A long-standing AFLW rivalry writes a new chapter on Sunday with Melbourne and Brisbane fighting for a home Preliminary Final.

programme.title: AFLW: EF ADE v STK
programme.desc: Three-time AFLW premier Adelaide hosts St Kilda in its first finals appearance in this do-or-die Elimination Final.

programme.title: AFL: Fremantle v Adelaide
programme.desc: The Crows head west to face the Dockers in a big Anzac Day clash.

programme.title: AFLW: GF NMT v BRI
programme.desc: Competition powerhouses North Melbourne and Brisbane clash in the AFLW Grand Final for the third year in a row at Ikon Park.

programme.title: AFL: Grand Final Geelong v Brisbane
programme.desc: Geelong and Brisbane face off for the 2025 Premiership.

programme.title: AFL: Grand Final Geelong v Brisbane
programme.desc: Geelong and Brisbane face off for the 2025 Premiership.

programme.title: AFLW: GF NMT v BRI
programme.desc: Competition powerhouses North Melbourne and Brisbane clash in the AFLW Grand Final for the third year in a row at Ikon Park.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1997 GF ADE v STK
programme.desc: The 90s-the decade that delivered. There were three new teams, for the first time non-Victorian clubs would take the premiership, and it was a decade of goalkicking maestros Jason Dunstall, Gary Ablett and Tony Lockett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1997 GF ADE v STK
programme.desc: The 90s-the decade that delivered. There were three new teams, for the first time non-Victorian clubs would take the premiership, and it was a decade of goalkicking maestros Jason Dunstall, Gary Ablett and Tony Lockett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2000 GF ESS v MEL
programme.desc: The 2000s - a decade where Brisbane and Geelong ruled the roost and an era of Brown, Judd and Ablett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2000 GF ESS v MEL
Best Games Ever: 2012 R16 RIC v GC
programme.desc: The 2010s - With two new teams, a drawn grand final and plenty of new talent, it was certainly a decade of spellbinding AFL football.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2012 R16 RIC v GC

AFLW: Semi Final Melbourne v Adelaide
AFLW: Semi Final Melbourne v Adelaide
programme.desc: A long-standing AFLW rivalry renews as Melbourne hosts Adelaide at Ikon Park with a place in the Preliminary Final on the line.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: VP Express finally deliver their first loads of the season, but after a heated confrontation with owners Hugh Rowland and Vlad Pleskot, new hire Art Burke falls behind the bosses on the way back home.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: VP Express finally deliver their first loads of the season, but after a heated confrontation with owners Hugh Rowland and Vlad Pleskot, new hire Art Burke falls behind the bosses on the way back home.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: Texan Greenhorn Andrew Neystel, 29, begins the second of three trial weeks in the rough seas of Iceland, training to become a deckhand on the Valdimar, a 40-year-old longline cod fishing boat.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In Minnesota, a customer wants his crusty Cabriolet transformed into a roadworthy vehicle he can take cross-country with his dad.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In Minnesota, a customer wants his crusty Cabriolet transformed into a roadworthy vehicle he can take cross-country with his dad.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: An evil spirit tells Dawn Whitehair to get out of her new home, Chris Page is plagued by a jealous ghost who wants him all to herself, and an entity tormenting a family possesses their medium.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: An evil spirit tells Dawn Whitehair to get out of her new home, Chris Page is plagued by a jealous ghost who wants him all to herself, and an entity tormenting a family possesses their medium.

programme.title: Velma
programme.desc: The origin of the sleuth and member of the Mystery Inc. gang, Velma.

programme.title: Velma
programme.desc: The origin of the sleuth and member of the Mystery Inc. gang, Velma.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We kick things off by taking a look at some car crashes through The Eye In The Sky, before once more getting all judgemental on our drivers by Identifying The Idiot.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We shift our focus to weather-related accidents and invite our drivers to Snow Me Where It Hurts before settling down for something highbrow, believe it or not, in Poetry Corner.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We shift our focus to weather-related accidents and invite our drivers to Snow Me Where It Hurts before settling down for something highbrow, believe it or not, in Poetry Corner.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess," "Worst Case Scenario," "Redneck Good Times," and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Julian Clary finds a Taskmaster champion, Susan Wokoma does something odd with mice, and Sue Perkins shows her passion for portcullises.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: Not only do some drivers disobey the mobile phone rules, there are sometimes serious doubts about their ability to drive at all.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: Unbelievably, a truck driver stops his big rig over a railway line, because he was following too close to the car in front.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: Unbelievably, a truck driver stops his big rig over a railway line, because he was following too close to the car in front.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi prepares for a showdown with transport police in South Australia.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa and Todd struggle to complete their joint venture across the frozen Hudson Bay. Art face's the last open ice crossing his first since his near fatal trip.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Mud Mountain Haulers is a character driven docu-series about steep slope logging in the highlands of British Columbia.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Shana and Edwina bring their Golden Girls chic to Riverside, California, but end up phoning it in, a messy unit catches Dave's attention, and Rene switches from buying to selling.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary dabbles with Dave's dark arts in Torrence, California; Kenny takes some excavation lessons; Brandi and Jarrod quit horsing around long enough to stumble across a wartime oddity.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi prepares for a showdown with transport police in South Australia.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi prepares for a showdown with transport police in South Australia.

programme.desc: Not only do some drivers disobey the mobile phone rules, there are sometimes serious doubts about their ability to drive at all.

programme.desc: Lisa and Todd struggle to complete their joint venture across the frozen Hudson Bay. Art face's the last open ice crossing his first since his near fatal trip.

programme.desc: Yogi prepares for a showdown with transport police in South Australia.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi prepares for a showdown with transport police in South Australia.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A group of prospectors search for gold in some of Australia's most secluded and inhospitable areas, facing danger as they seek their fortune.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Ceci says Colette's kindness is for show, Colette secretly gives Noa the perfect gift to prove her heart's in the right place.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Ceci says Colette's kindness is for show, Colette secretly gives Noa the perfect gift to prove her heart's in the right place.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Colette learns Noa is seeing someone, Ceci urges her to use a little magic to win him back. Meanwhile, Barb hunts for the culprit behind rude DMV graffiti.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Shana and Edwina bring their Golden Girls chic to Riverside, California, but end up phoning it in, a messy unit catches Dave's attention, and Rene switches from buying to selling.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary dabbles with Dave's dark arts in Torrence, California; Kenny takes some excavation lessons; Brandi and Jarrod quit horsing around long enough to stumble across a wartime oddity.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa and Todd struggle to complete their joint venture across the frozen Hudson Bay. Art face's the last open ice crossing his first since his near fatal trip.

programme.title: Live: ODI: IND v SA Game 1
programme.desc: After suffering their worst Test series loss on record, the number one-ranked ODI squad India seeks revenge.

programme.title: Ashes: 2002/03 1st Test
programme.desc: The 2002/03 features an Australian outfit in their prime. A relentless bowling attack from Glenn McGrath and Jason Gillespie, a stunning MCG Test double century for Justin Langer, and finally, an Australian legend gets his "Perfect Day."

programme.title: Ashes: 2002/03 2nd Test
programme.desc: 02/03 Ashes features an Australian outfit in their prime. A relentless bowling attack from Glenn McGrath and Jason Gillespie, a stunning MCG Test double century for Justin Langer, and finally, an Australian legend gets his "Perfect Day."

programme.title: Ashes: 2002/03 3rd Test
programme.desc: The 2002/03 features an Australian outfit in their prime. A relentless bowling attack from Glenn McGrath and Jason Gillespie, a stunning MCG Test double century for Justin Langer, and finally, an Australian legend gets his "Perfect Day."

programme.title: Ashes: 2002/03 5th Test
programme.desc: The 2002/03 features an Australian outfit in their prime. A relentless bowling attack from Glenn McGrath and Jason Gillespie, a stunning MCG Test double century for Justin Langer, and finally, an Australian legend gets his "Perfect Day."

programme.desc: Australia's Prime Minister's XI face England's XI in a two-day pink-ball tour match in Canberra.

programme.desc: Australia's Prime Minister's XI face England's XI in a two-day pink-ball tour match in Canberra.

programme.desc: A final-ball win by the Strikers in their last encounter gives the Heat motivation in a must win encounter.

programme.desc: Catch the coin toss, pitch report, pre-match player interviews, tactical analysis plus all the buzz from around the ground B4 the Bash.

programme.desc: The Hurricanes host the Stars in Tasmania for what could be a finals preview.

programme.desc: Hurricanes travel to Melbourne to face the Stars.

programme.title: WBBL The Blast
programme.desc: The Blast brings you all the analysis and laughs from Ninja Stadium following Hurricanes v Stars.

programme.title: Golf: PGA Championship Mini: Final Round
programme.desc: The 2025 BMW Australian PGA Championship returns to the prestigious Royal Queensland Golf Club, uniting top golfing talent from around the world.

programme.title: Golf: PGA Championship Mini: Final Round
programme.desc: The 2025 BMW Australian PGA Championship returns to the prestigious Royal Queensland Golf Club, uniting top golfing talent from around the world.

programme.title: Golf: PGA Championship Mini: Final Round
programme.desc: The 2025 BMW Australian PGA Championship returns to the prestigious Royal Queensland Golf Club, uniting top golfing talent from around the world.

programme.desc: The 2025 BMW Australian PGA Championship returns to the prestigious Royal Queensland Golf Club, uniting top golfing talent from around the world.

programme.title: Golf: Australian PGA: Championship FR

programme.title: Golf: PGA Championship Mini: Final Round
programme.desc: The 2025 BMW Australian PGA Championship returns to the prestigious Royal Queensland Golf Club, uniting top golfing talent from around the world.

programme.title: 1980: Greg Norman's First Aus Open Win
programme.sub-title: 1980: Greg Norman's First Aus Open Win
programme.desc: The Lakes Golf Club: Greg Norman, a young Queenslander with the world at his feet, took another step along the road to golfing greatness by winning his first Australian Open in 1980. He would later go on to win five at this event.

programme.title: 1984: Tom Watson Australian Open Triumph
programme.desc: Royal Melbourne: Tom Watson triumphs in the playoff to become the fifth American to win this Tournament.

programme.title: 1985: Greg Norman Wins Historic Aus Open
programme.sub-title: 1985: Greg Norman Wins Historic Aus Open
programme.desc: Royal Melbourne: Going into the final round there wasa four-way tie for the lead, but Greg Norman thundered to victory. Norman becomes fourth player to win both the Australian PGA and the Australian Open in the same year.

programme.title: 1987: Greg Norman Makes Aus Open History
programme.sub-title: 1987: Greg Norman Makes Aus Open History
programme.desc: Royal Melbourne: In spectacular style, Greg Norman absolutely decimated the field at the Australian Open by a whopping 10 strokes. That winning margin was also the largest in the history of the event.

programme.title: 1995: Greg Norman Wins Fourth Aus Open
programme.sub-title: 1995: Greg Norman Wins Fourth Aus Open

programme.title: 2011: Greg Chalmers Wins Second Aus Open
programme.sub-title: 2011: Greg Chalmers Wins Second Aus Open
programme.desc: The Lakes, Sydney: Australian left-hander Greg Chalmers held his nerve to win the Australian Open for the second time in his career, 13 years after his first win. He held off a late charge by John Senden and Tiger Woods to claim victory.

programme.title: 2013: Rory McIlroy Aus Open Knockout Win
programme.sub-title: 2013: Rory McIlroy Aus Open Knockout Win

programme.title: 1980: Greg Norman's First Aus Open Win
programme.sub-title: 1980: Greg Norman's First Aus Open Win

programme.title: Houseboat
programme.desc: A widowed man and his three children fall for an Italian woman who joins their floating home as housekeeper. He wins both their love and hers too.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: An expert rafter takes her family for a day out on the river. But when two bank robbers hijack their raft, it turns into a white-water knuckle-biter.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: K-9
programme.desc: Thomas Dooley is an unorthodox narcotics cop who teams with an independently minded police dog in this hilarious action-comedy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: A secret agent is sent to Sydney to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called Chimera.

programme.title: Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The epic story of love and adventure in a lawless land shows the complex portrayal of the most famous lawman in the Wild West.

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Retired artists, Carole and Roger, have filled every room of their nine bed Georgian home with unusual objects they've collected from all over the world. But their country pile is in urgent need of repair.

programme.title: Double the Money
programme.desc: The remaining teams have two weeks to double their 2000-pounds stake. One team flips cars, another's family fun day risks a washout, and one duo gets blocked on social media during a make-up class.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's the semi-final and the remaining potters face the infamous toilet challenge and are tested on their intricate brushwork by Duchess China guest judge, Lee Price.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: If you think an investment property will make you rich, think again. Anne and Garry's house in Perth's outer suburbs should have been a goldmine, instead, it's a liability.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Krystyn, 75, is in A&E after a car crash with a truck; cyclist Ian has collided with a car; 84-year-old Madge has fallen at home.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow is at Stonor Park in Oxfordshire where treasures include a unique group of Indian medals, Florence Nightingale's toolkit, and the story of a remarkable female pilot from WWII.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Who Will Love My Doggy?
programme.desc: This series has a simple mission - to find loving new homes for dogs whose previous owners can no longer care for them.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona & Alex, paramedics who met in training, clash over staying or moving. She wants comfort, he wants change. Neale updates their home while Andrew looks for their next one.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: In the Quarter Final, sewers create diva-inspired garments. They tackle a fringed dress inspired by Tina Turner, comfy animal print outfits, and choose stage outfits for their favourite divas.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: John and Kitsa invested enormous amounts into their business and residential building but are now struggling with debt. Can the team convert its main focus back to a residence with a small business element?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Denise Nurse helps a teacher settle in Suffolk after decades abroad and meets a couple who turned barbecuing into a booming business.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona sounds a 14th century Moot Horn and meets comedian Michael McIntyre as he prepares a comic prank in disguise.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The team roll up at Wadebridge Fair in Cornwall. Anita Manning is joined by experts Tim Weeks and Philip Serrell who try to lead their teams to victory.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Joh hangs out with a hat designer. Ed makes a chocolate lover's cake. Dr Harry helps a woman with territorial geese.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Krys are desperate to finish the renovations in their abandoned orangery; Richard and Will are on the hunt for a magnificent family chateau.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil's with Josh and Anna, who are searching for their first home together. Meanwhile, Kirstie is with Sue and Samira who are making a bold move across the country to buy in a city they barely know.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: If you think an investment property will make you rich, think again. Anne and Garry's house in Perth's outer suburbs should have been a goldmine, instead, it's a liability.

programme.title: Nurses On The Ward
programme.desc: Following the nurses of Queen Alexandra Hospital in Portsmouth as they work across multiple areas of the hospital treating both male and female patients from a range of age groups.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona & Alex, paramedics who met in training, clash over staying or moving. She wants comfort, he wants change. Neale updates their home while Andrew looks for their next one.

programme.title: Luxury Escapes: World's Best Holidays
programme.desc: Pia Miranda and Mike Reid explore Iceland's waterfalls, whales, and lagoons before London glamour at The Shard with fine dining above the city.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Denise Nurse helps a teacher settle in Suffolk after decades abroad and meets a couple who turned barbecuing into a booming business.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Krystyn, 75, is in A&E after a car crash with a truck; cyclist Ian has collided with a car; 84-year-old Madge has fallen at home.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Thin Ice
programme.desc: A police chief (Tom Selleck) lands in trouble with the town council after a shootout on the streets of Boston.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: A Will To Kill
programme.desc: Ex-prosecutor Hailey Dean becomes a marriage counsellor and therapist. But, she gets caught up in a missing case and tries to solve the mystery surrounded by it to uncover the whole truth.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: A Will To Kill
programme.desc: Ex-prosecutor Hailey Dean becomes a marriage counsellor and therapist. But, she gets caught up in a missing case and tries to solve the mystery surrounded by it to uncover the whole truth.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A recently divorced mother attempts to create a perfect Christmas for her children's first time without dad, but a series of comic mishaps threaten her best-laid plans.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A recently divorced mother attempts to create a perfect Christmas for her children's first time without dad, but a series of comic mishaps threaten her best-laid plans.

programme.title: Murder She Baked: A Plum Pudding Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah is whipping up a special plum pudding for Christmas when she finds a man dead in his own office. The 12 days of Christmas are ticking along, and she's running out of time to find the murderer.

programme.title: Murder She Baked: A Plum Pudding Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah is whipping up a special plum pudding for Christmas when she finds a man dead in his own office. The 12 days of Christmas are ticking along, and she's running out of time to find the murderer.

programme.title: Christmas in Conway
programme.desc: Hoping it will be the perfect Christmas present for his wife, a man plans to construct a Ferris wheel in his backyard.

programme.title: Christmas in Conway
programme.desc: Hoping it will be the perfect Christmas present for his wife, a man plans to construct a Ferris wheel in his backyard.

programme.title: Christmas on the Vine
programme.desc: A teen discovers the plight of the homeless when a vagrant takes him on a walking tour of Philadelphia landmarks.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Fearsome monsters Godzilla and King Kong square off in an epic battle for the ages, while humanity looks to wipe out both of the creatures and take back the planet once and for all.

programme.title: The Dark Knight Rises
programme.desc: It has been years since Batman vanished into the night, turning from hero to fugitive. Everything will change with the arrival of a cunning cat burglar, and the emergence of masked terrorist, Bane.

programme.title: Roboshark
programme.desc: What starts off as a typical day on the streets of Seattle soon becomes a terrifying bloodbath, when a great white shark devours an alien space probe - and Roboshark is born.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: After being denied his dream job with the Secret Service, a cop with a bad attitude must save his daughter and the President after heavily armed militants take over the White House.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: The Bad Guys
programme.desc: The Bad Guys are the most notorious criminals in the world, pulling off a lifetime of legendary heists, but can the gang of misfits pull off their biggest job yet: going good?

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: It's up to the most rascally sheep in England to bring the flock home when a caravan and a very steep hill lead them all to the big city.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: Oscar is a fast-talking little fish whose big dreams have a habit of landing him in hot water. Lenny is a great white shark with a sensitive side and a secret: he's a vegetarian.

programme.title: Top Cat Begins
programme.desc: Poor, lonely and living on the streets, Top Cat meets Benny, a naive and good-hearted cat looking for adventure. The pair quickly become best buddies - and partners in crime - pickpocketing their way out of poverty and quickly believing they are the real cats' whiskers! Setting their sights higher, Top Cat and Benny hatch a plan to steal diamonds from crime boss Mr Big. Along the way, our heroes meet fellow alley cats Choo Choo, Fancy-Fancy and Brain, and together they're a formidable bunch. However, when Mr Big catches up with them and captures Top Cat, can his new friends save the day?

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: The inspirational story of a shy Yorkshire piglet who doesn't quite know his place in the world. But when Farmer Hoggett wins him at the county fair, Babe discovers that he can be anything he wants to be - even an award-winning sheepdog. With the help of a delightful assortment of barnyard friends, the heroic little pig is headed for the challenge of his life in this endearing and fun-filled tale the whole family will love.

programme.title: The Tale of Despereaux
programme.desc: Once upon a time, in the far away kingdom of Dor, lived a brave and virtuous mouse with comically oversized ears who dreamt of becoming a knight. Banished from his home for having such lofty ambitions, Despereaux sets off on an amazing adventure with his good-hearted rat friend Roscuro, who leads him, at long last, on a very noble quest to rescue an endangered princess and save an entire kingdom from darkness. Based on the heart-warming, bestselling children's book and featuring the voice talents of an all-star cast, this film is a magical, modern fairytale that's destined to win the hearts of young and old alike.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When Oh, a loveable misfit from another planet, lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own people, he forms an unlikely friendship with an adventurous girl named Tip who is on a quest of her own. Through a series of comic adventures with Tip, Oh comes to understand that being different and making mistakes is all part of being human. And while he changes her planet and she changes his world, they discover the true meaning of the word home.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: When California girl Susan Murphy is clobbered by space gunk on her wedding day, she mysteriously grows to 49-feet-11-inches tall. The military puts her into a secret government compound, renamed Ginormica and hold her captive along with a ragtag group of Monsters: the brilliant but insect-headed Dr Cockroach, Ph.D.; the macho half-ape, half-fish, The Missing Link; the gelatinous and indestructible B.O.B.; and the 350-foot grub, Insectosaurus. But when a wild and dangerous alien robot lands on Earth, The President enlists this motley crew to save the world from imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy and Jeff Garlin put their parenting skills to the test in this hilarious caper about two sacked admen and newly stay-at-home dads who open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Diddy: The Making of a Bad Boy
Diddy: The Making of a Bad Boy
Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails face Shadow, a powerful new foe. Outmatched, they form an unexpected alliance to stop him and protect the planet.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: When Ron Burgundy is told he will be working with a young, ambitious newswoman, it turns to war.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
The Hangover
programme.desc: When three friends wake up in a trashed Las Vegas hotel room after a bachelor party, they realise the groom is missing and must piece together the night's events - one hazy clue at a time.
